race.comment: SPRING QUEEN (8) will be peaking third up from a spell, and she has had a trial since a poor run here nearly 7 weeks ago. This field is not strong, and she has a chance to get back into the winner's circle here. ROSINA (5) dropped back into this grade and immediately found some form again when finishing third. She won't have to improve by much to go close to taking this out. WHATS THE ONE CODE (4) ran out of condition last time out at Pukekohe, and he does prefer to race in an anti-clockwise direction. He is peaking at the right time, and is out each-way play in the modest field. HAPPY VENTURE (3) ran his best race in some time when dropping down to this class in his penultimate start. He can race handy to the pace in this, and he can figure in the top 3. AIR DANCER (1) set the pace and kicked strongly to hold onto third at long adds at Trentham nearly 8 weeks ago. That form will make him a top 4 chance in this sort of field.
